ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family embracing. The sequence begins with the robot's arms open wide in a welcoming gesture. Then, the arms move to embrace an imaginary family, followed by a gentle lowering of the arms, suggesting a warm and protective feeling. Finally, the arms return to a relaxed position.  The sequence uses both arms symmetrically for a balanced and inclusive representation of the family unit.

frames.beat: arms open wide in a welcoming embrace
arms draw inward, gathering the family close
a gentle hug, holding loved ones near
arms relax, a warm feeling lingers
